jobDescription: LIVI is Europe’s leading digital healthcare company backed by top-tier investors including Accel and Index Ventures. Join us in our mission to build better and more accessible healthcare. We are using technology to digitise healthcare and provide a service that gives the patient the best possible healthcare experience, regardless of location. Headquartered in Stockholm, we’re expanding internationally, with operations in the UK, France and Norway. We’re looking for organised and hardworking people to join our growing Medical Operations team in the UK team. You will work closely with our Medical Operations Managers, providing hands-on support to help scale our operations as we develop and scale a variety of innovative business models to provide digital healthcare to patients across the UK. The work will be arranged in shift patterns: a combination of early mornings, evenings and weekends. What you’ll do GP Support Support GPs in their day-to-day work helping them whenever they need Always strive to make sure our GPs have the best experience working with LIVIMake sure that the appointment schedule runs like clockwork Ensure that we have enough GPs on hand to fulfil patient demand Patient Support Answer emails and calls from patients in an accurate and friendly manner Quickly find resolutions to patient queries both on the phone and via email Be the voice of the customer and feedback recurring problems to help make the patient experience first class Practice Administration Efficiently and accurately process all prescriptions, sick note and referrals Build relationships with our growing network of partner pharmacies To problem solve and react in an agile fashion Who you are Passionate about providing a high level of customer service Excellent communication skills: proficient in English, both spoken and written Highly-organised with strong attention to detail Able to use multiple systems and multitask in a fast-paced environment Strong initiative and problem-solving capability An interest in the healthcare sector is preferred When you’ll work You will work an agreed combination of hours, within our opening times of: 7am-10pm Monday- Friday9am-5pm Saturday & Sunday What you’ll get Part time employment paid on hourly wages (6 month fixed term contract available) Work in a close-knit team of entrepreneurs, ex-consultants and industry leaders setting up LIVI’s UK operation The opportunity to have a distinct, positive impact on the future of healthcare for millions of UK patients
